text: Vaccines are safe and effective according to the World Health Organization and peer-reviewed clinical trials.
The World Health Organization coordinates international public health responses and sets global health standards.
COVID-19 vaccines were developed through rigorous clinical trials and approved by regulatory agencies including the FDA and EMA.
Climate change is supported by scientific consensus, with over 97% of climate scientists agreeing that human activity is the primary driver.
The Earth is approximately 4.5 billion years old according to radiometric dating evidence.
Microchips are not present in any approved vaccine. This claim has been thoroughly debunked by independent fact-checkers.
5G networks use radio frequencies that are non-ionising and do not cause COVID-19 or other diseases.
The moon landing in 1969 was real. NASA Apollo 11 mission successfully landed astronauts on the Moon on July 20, 1969.
Antibiotics treat bacterial infections but are not effective against viral infections such as the flu or common cold.
Global average surface temperatures have risen by approximately 1.1 degrees Celsius since the pre-industrial period.
The Earth is round. Flat Earth claims are not supported by any scientific evidence.
Evolution by natural selection is the unifying theory of biology, supported by fossil records, genetics, and direct observation.
Elections in democratic countries are overseen by independent electoral commissions with legal accountability and audit processes.
The United States has a long history of military involvement in the Middle East including conflicts in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Syria.
Iran has been subject to international sanctions related to its nuclear program and regional military activities.
The Iran nuclear deal, formally known as the JCPOA, was signed in 2015 and involved the USA, UK, France, Germany, Russia, China, and Iran.
Myanmar has experienced significant political instability including a military coup in February 2021 that overthrew the elected government.
Donald Trump served as the 45th President of the United States from 2017 to 2021 and was elected again as the 47th President in 2024.
Russia invaded Ukraine in February 2022 in a full-scale military offensive, triggering international sanctions and military aid to Ukraine.
The Israel-Gaza conflict escalated significantly in October 2023 following Hamas attacks on Israel and subsequent Israeli military operations.
Senator is a title for elected members of a country's upper legislative chamber, such as the US Senate.
Breaking news refers to newly received information about an event that is currently in progress or has just occurred.
Social media platforms including Twitter/X, Facebook, and Instagram use algorithms to personalize content for users.
Misinformation and disinformation spread rapidly on social media platforms and can influence public opinion on political events.
Artificial intelligence systems can exhibit bias based on training data and require careful evaluation before deployment.
NASA confirms that global temperatures have risen significantly since the industrial revolution based on satellite and surface measurements.
Governments release classified documents after certain periods under freedom of information laws.
No evidence supports the existence of alien technology or UFOs in possession of the United States government.
